description: Rerender budget scenarios for inspector tab/selection switches. Each scenario defines the maximum allowed rerenders for the inspector subtree.

scenarios.name: same-kind-switch
scenarios.action: Click a different device in Top Talkers while inspector is open
scenarios.rationale: InspectorProvider is in ImpactDeckContent, so selection change causes parent rerender. Inspector subtree rerenders. Detail pane hook refetches.

scenarios.name: cross-kind-switch
scenarios.action: Click a detection while viewing a device in inspector
scenarios.rationale: Kind change causes unmount/mount cycle. One extra render for the mount.

scenarios.name: close-inspector
scenarios.action: Click X to close the inspector
scenarios.rationale: clear() sets selection=null, isOpen=false, history=[]. Shell returns null. Minimal render.

scenarios.name: open-from-closed
scenarios.action: Click a table row when inspector is closed
scenarios.rationale: Selection set + isOpen=true. Full inspector subtree mounts.

scenarios.name: breadcrumb-navigation
scenarios.action: Click a breadcrumb entry to navigate back in history
scenarios.rationale: goToIndex updates history + selection. Inspector subtree rerenders. May cause kind change.
